paper_title: GPT-NeoX-20B: An Open-Source Autoregressive Language Model

raw_extraction.innovation: GPT-NeoX-20B introduces a 20 billion parameter autoregressive language model trained on the Pile dataset, featuring rotary positional embeddings, parallel attention and feed-forward layers, and a modified layer normalization scheme
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, text generation, few-shot reasoning, knowledge-based tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models and improving language understanding through large-scale pre-training
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Twelve Supermicro AS-4124GO-NART servers, each with eight NVIDIA A100-SXM4-40GB GPUs
raw_extraction.extension: Applies rotary positional embeddings to the first 25% of embedding dimensions, and uses untied layer norms instead of tied layer norms as in GPT-J
raw_extraction.paper_title: GPT-NeoX-20B: An Open-Source Autoregressive Language Model
